feedback.text: The matter of ecology and wellbeing of science needs to be taken into consideration as well. Most of the mobile devices on the market are very capable computers, which can be easily repurposed into other devices because of ADB and possibility of sideloading. What was once a phone can be a controller for plant humidity, CCTV camera, device controlling printers remotely, a radio controlled submarine or a drone, smart light controller etc. - the possibilities are endless. This will be huge blow for future generations to have easily accessible cheap resources for experimentation taken away. And it will massively increase an amount of electrowaste we are creating, as the device will just become garbage once the final owner will decide to upgrade.
